ticket.subject: Hey guys, something is going on with quoting the s...
ticket.raw_subject: Hey guys, something is going on with quoting the s...
ticket.description:
Hey guys, something is going on with quoting the shipping rates, sometimes it will under quote what the cost should be. In this example, the actual cost we paid for shipping was $64.88 and should have been $97.32 after markup. But the guy only paid $34.13 total. Also, its also very weird that 2Day rates are the same as express saver (our shipping manager told me that 2Day should always be pretty much higher).

If you guys could look into this to see what is going on that would be awesome.

------------------
Submitted from: https://mcsl-s.pluginhive.io/home/settings/frontendrates/ratelog/summary/73e7f4eb724c4e7bc8aff63fdfadfa3c

comments.body:
Hello Calvin,

Thank you for sharing the order number. Could you login to the FedEx portal, provide the below mentioned details of the order 17009 and check for the rates?

If any discrepancy found, please share a complete screenshot of the shipping and package details provided, and the shipping rates provided along with the breakup.

From Address - 1265 Upsala Road, Suite 1165, Sanford, Florida, 32771, US

To Address - 47 ACR 5127, Concho, Arizona, 85924, US

Package Weight and Dimensions - 1.35 lbs and 12x9x6 in

*Residential Address option to be enabled

Best regards,
Sagar K S
PluginHive

comments.body:
Hey, I used another address for testing.


1826 Nottingham SW, Winter Haven FL, 33880.



Below you can see for example the FedEX 2Day is $57 but on the website shows as $34 (before markup).



The rates are surely not matching up 1-to-1 for all of them. It seems like 2day is matching the same rates as Express Saver for some reason.



It’s odd because the Home Delivery charge seems to be correct after the markup (which is 0.50), so clearly not all of the rates are wrong, but plenty are.



For example, Express Saver should have been $50 after markup but only charges $34. But FedEx 2Day AM actually looks right for example, with a charge of $60 which is about correct with a markup of 0.50.



 ![CleanShot 2026-04-09 at 10.08.58.png](https://support.pluginhive.com/attachments/token/Z7kmYFjVYFHEuvhRxcTW5xFet/?name=CleanShot+2026-04-09+at+10.08.58.png)



 ![CleanShot 2026-04-09 at 10.13.00.png](https://support.pluginhive.com/attachments/token/Hm6nL7eUHw1I400vMJxFgqRRx/?name=CleanShot+2026-04-09+at+10.13.00.png)



 ![CleanShot 2026-04-09 at 10.09.37.png](https://support.pluginhive.com/attachments/token/xGu3uCM25N35xGE5RGTRFU2Ch/?name=CleanShot+2026-04-09+at+10.09.37.png)


**Best Regards, **
Calvin Hunt

Marketing Director



**Pangolin** **| Kvant | Unity**

comments.body:
Hello Calvin,

Adding to the previous response, we need complete screenshots from FedEx portal that shows the Account Number used, the Ship From and To Adddress provided, the Package details provided and the rates shown along with their Breakup.
You can also share a video recording of this.

Alternatively, we can also connect over a Zoom call to discuss about this if it is easy for you. A slot can be booked for the call using this link - Click Here

Best regards,
Sagar K S
PluginHive
